testcase.name: testClickMusicAndScroll
testcase.system-out: Loaded 7 cookies After cookie load — URL: https://open.spotify.com/ TEST 1: Clicking Music tab... TEST 1: On Music — https://open.spotify.com/home?facet=music-chip TEST 1: Scrolling through music content... Scrolled through 0 cards TEST 1: Done scrolling music

testcase.name: testClickPodcastsAndScroll
testcase.system-out: TEST 2: Clicking Podcasts tab... TEST 2: On Podcasts — https://open.spotify.com/home?facet=podcasts-chip TEST 2: Scrolling through podcast content... Scrolled through 0 cards TEST 2: Done scrolling podcasts

testcase.name: testClickAudiobooksAndScroll
testcase.system-out: TEST 3: Clicking Audiobooks tab... TEST 3: On Audiobooks — https://open.spotify.com/home?facet=audiobooks-chip TEST 3: Scrolling through audiobooks content... Scrolled through 0 cards TEST 3: Done scrolling audiobooks

testcase.name: testGoBackToMusicAndClickFollowing
testcase.system-out: TEST 4: Going back to Music tab... TEST 4: Back on Music — https://open.spotify.com/home?facet=music-chip TEST 4: Clicking Following tab... TEST 4: On Following — https://open.spotify.com/home?facet=music-following-chip

testcase.name: testClickBrowseArtistsAndScroll

testcase.name: testOpenDrakeAlbum
testcase.system-out: TEST 2: Album page title = $ome $exy $ongs 4 U - Album by PARTYNEXTDOOR, Drake | Spotify

testcase.name: testLikeFirstSong
testcase.system-out: TEST 3: Right clicked first song TEST 3: Saved to Liked Songs!

testcase.name: testAddSongToPlaylistViaMenu
testcase.system-out: TEST 4: Clicked ... menu TEST 4: Added song to My Playlist #2!

testcase.name: testSearchHonestlyNevermind
testcase.system-out: TEST 5: Searched Honestly Nevermind — URL: https://open.spotify.com/search/Honestly%20Nevermind

testcase.name: testAddHonestlyNevermindSongToPlaylist
testcase.system-out: TEST 6: Clicked Albums tab TEST 6: Opened album — https://open.spotify.com/album/3cf4iSSKd8ffTncbtKljXw TEST 6: Added Honestly Nevermind song to playlist!
